model.description: Multi-turn agent editing a Noto vault. INPUT = context re-fed per turn (baseline: whole vault + full memory; optimized: real semantic top-K). OUTPUT = tokens emitted to land each change (baseline: whole-file rewrite + inline restated decisions; optimized: append_note/update_section deltas + structured remember()).
model.obsidianAssumption: Obsidian out of the box has no agent semantic-retrieval and no MCP write-back/patch layer, so an agent driving it uses full-context reads and whole-file writes — identical to the naive baseline. A raw/no-tool agent is equal or worse, so Obsidian is the conservative baseline.
model.inputCaveat: Input optimized = real semanticSearchNotes + semanticRecall top-K, same as benchmark-token-savings.mts.
model.outputCaveat: Output savings are vs a whole-file-rewrite baseline. An agent harness with its own native diff/patch tool already captures part of this; Noto's contribution is providing append/section-patch primitives over a remote notes store where the alternative is a full-body write. create_note (new files) emits full content in BOTH paths — no output saving there, and the session contains none.

perTurn.query: How do plants convert light energy into stored chemical energy?
What is the role of carbon dioxide in the Calvin cycle?
How is chloroplast structure related to glucose production?
What does an enzyme do to the activation energy of a reaction?
Summarise the internal organisation of a typical cell.
What is glucose and how does it store energy?
What were the main tensions between the US and USSR after WWII?
When and why did the Industrial Revolution begin?
How does a logarithm relate to exponentiation?
What are the central themes of Macbeth?
Pull the key points from the May 13 biology lecture.
Refine the photosynthesis overview now that related notes are linked.

outputScalingNote: A fixed-size edit emitted as a whole-file rewrite vs an update_section delta, over synthetic note bodies of increasing size. The delta stays flat; the rewrite scales with the note, so output savings climb toward 100% on large notes/files (the deep-agentic-coding regime). Bodies are synthetic, labeled here.
